name: nav2gpt ROS 2 Humble
postCreateCommand: echo 'source /opt/ros/$ROS_DISTRO/setup.bash' >> ~/.bashrc && echo 'source ${COLCON_WS}/nav2gpt_ws/install/setup.bash 2>/dev/null || true' >> ~/.bashrc && echo 'export RMW_IMPLEMENTATION=rmw_cyclonedds_cpp' >> ~/.bashrc && echo 'source /usr/share/colcon_cd/function/colcon_cd.sh' >> ~/.bashrc && echo 'export _colcon_cd_root=/opt/ros/humble/' >> ~/.bashrc && echo 'source /usr/share/colcon_argcomplete/hook/colcon-argcomplete.bash' >> ~/.bashrc && echo 'export TURTLEBOT3_MODEL=burger' >> ~/.bashrc && echo '' >> ~/.bashrc && echo '# Start Ollama server in background if not running' >> ~/.bashrc && echo 'pgrep ollama > /dev/null || ollama serve &> /tmp/ollama.log &' >> ~/.bashrc
